messages.content: "Save this puppy from wandering onto a busy road" rephrase it and enhanced it
"Prevent this puppy from straying onto a bustling roadway and ensure its safety."
"Have a garden where every plant grows candy instead of fruit" ephrase it and enhance it
"Cultivate a magical garden where each plant yields an abundance of candy rather than traditional fruit."
a garden where every plant grows candy instead of fruit rephrase it and enhance it
"Envision a whimsical garden where, in place of fruit, each plant blossoms with an array of delightful candies."
Write me a image prompt for generating "the fastest skateboard in the world"

"Visualize an aerodynamic skateboard, sleek in design, with a surface gleaming under the bright sun. This skateboard, crafted from futuristic, ultra-light materials, features cutting-edge, frictionless wheels and an advanced propulsion system hidden within its streamlined body. The background is a blur, showcasing its incredible speed, with dynamic lines and sparks trailing behind to emphasize its rapid movement. The setting sun casts a golden glow, highlighting the determination in the eyes of the rider, geared up in high-tech safety equipment, their posture poised and ready to break all speed barriers. This is the fastest skateboard in the world, a marvel of engineering and design, captured in a moment of breathtaking velocity."
Write me a image prompt for generating “Disneyland with your family”

"Imagine a vibrant, enchanting scene of Disneyland, bathed in the golden light of a perfect afternoon. In the foreground, a joyful family, hand in hand, is captured in a moment of pure happiness as they enter the magical gates. The children's eyes sparkle with excitement, their faces painted with favorite Disney characters, as they tug at their parents, eager to explore the wonders within. The iconic Sleeping Beauty Castle rises majestically in the background, framed by a clear blue sky and fluffy, white clouds. Colorful balloons float gently in the air, and the distant sounds of cheerful music and laughter set the atmosphere. The family is dressed in themed attire, with Mickey Mouse ears for everyone, highlighting their shared adventure. Around them, the park is alive with the magic of Disney, from the meticulously crafted landscapes to the favorite characters greeting guests around every corner. This image captures the joy, wonder, and family bonding that define a day spent in Disneyland."
Write me a image prompt for generating “He can speak every languace and think everything”

"Visualize a figure radiating an aura of wisdom and knowledge, standing at the crossroads of a bustling, global metropolis that represents the intersection of the world's cultures and languages. This individual, with an expression of profound understanding and empathy, effortlessly communicates with people from every corner of the globe that approach him. His eyes, a mirror to his soul, reflect the depth of his thoughts and the vast expanse of his intellect. Around him, translucent bubbles contain symbols, characters, and scripts from countless languages—each bubble pulsating with the vibrant energy of communication. The background is a tapestry of iconic landmarks from across the world, symbolizing the universality of his linguistic prowess. Above him, a network of light beams connects to form a neural lattice, illustrating his capacity to think everything—each connection representing a spark of idea, knowledge, or innovation. This image encapsulates the essence of a being who has transcended ordinary limits to speak every language and think everything, embodying the pinnacle of human potential and understanding."
Write me a image prompt for generating “He knows and thinks to much”

"Envision a solitary figure ensconced in a dimly lit study, surrounded by towering shelves of ancient and modern tomes, their pages brimming with the secrets of the universe. The ambiance is saturated with a sense of profound contemplation and the weight of knowledge. He sits at an old wooden desk, cluttered with parchments, artifacts, and technological devices that span the ages, illustrating the convergence of past, present, and future insights. Above him, an ethereal glow emanates from a complex network of ideas, represented by interconnected orbs of light that hover and pulse with each thought. His eyes, intense and piercing, stare into the distance, reflecting an internal world where the bounds of understanding are ceaselessly expanded. The air around him vibrates with the energy of unceasing cognition, making tangible the immense burden and power of his thoughts. This scene captures the essence of a person who knows too much and thinks too deeply, isolated yet connected to the infinite tapestry of knowledge and understanding."
Write me a image prompt for generating “Lamborghini urus”

"Visualize the epitome of luxury and performance, a Lamborghini Urus, painted in a vibrant, eye-catching shade of neon yellow that gleams under the intense rays of the setting sun. The vehicle is poised powerfully on an open stretch of pristine asphalt, its sleek, aerodynamic lines and aggressive stance signaling unmatched speed and agility. The Urus's signature LED headlights pierce the twilight, casting an intense gaze onto the road ahead, while its muscular contours are accentuated by the dramatic interplay of light and shadow, highlighting the sophisticated Italian design and craftsmanship. Behind, the landscape blurs into a mélange of colors, suggestive of the car's breathtaking acceleration and power. The scene is imbued with a sense of motion, even in stillness, reflecting the Urus's dual nature as a super sports car and a luxury SUV. This image captures the Lamborghini Urus in all its glory, a masterpiece of engineering and aesthetics, ready to conquer the road."
Write me a image prompt for generating “Aston Martin DBX”

"Picture a scene of refined elegance and power, featuring the Aston Martin DBX, cloaked in a sophisticated shade of midnight blue that almost merges with the twilight surrounding it. This luxury SUV sits gracefully on a secluded, winding road that cuts through an opulent, misty forest, embodying a perfect blend of nature's tranquility and automotive prowess. The DBX's sleek, aerodynamic body is highlighted by the last rays of the setting sun, which glint off its immaculate paintwork and aluminum details, creating a play of light that accentuates its exquisite lines and curves. Its distinctive grille and sharp, LED headlights gaze forward, casting a luminous path through the gathering dusk, while the powerful stance of the vehicle portrays an unspoken promise of performance and agility. The backdrop of ancient trees and the serene forest atmosphere lend an air of mystery and adventure, inviting onlookers to imagine embarking on a journey of unparalleled comfort and style. This image encapsulates the essence of the Aston Martin DBX, a symbol of luxury, innovation, and the adventurous spirit that drives the open road."
Write me two image prompt for generating “Formula One Race Car” and "Lamborgini Technica"

### Formula One Race Car

"Envision the ultimate symbol of speed and precision: a Formula One race car, its chassis a masterpiece of aerodynamic engineering, painted in a vibrant livery that screams velocity. Positioned assertively on the starting grid of a world-famous circuit, the tarmac beneath it shimmering with the heat of anticipation. The car's sleek, low profile is accentuated by the aggressive front wing and the intricate rear diffuser, all designed to slice through the air with minimal resistance. Around it, the air vibrates with the roar of engines and the palpable excitement of racing aficionados. The driver, visible only through the sliver of the helmet visor, exudes a calm focus, ready to unleash the power at his fingertips at the flash of green. Above, the grandstands blur with the colors of thousands of fans, all eyes riveted on this pinnacle of motorsport technology and performance. This scene is not just a display of a Formula One race car but a homage to the relentless pursuit of speed, innovation, and human ingenuity."

### Lamborghini Huracán Tecnica

"Imagine a world where design, power, and technology converge into a symphony of speed and style, embodied in the Lamborghini Huracán Tecnica. It stands boldly amidst the surreal landscape of a salt flat, where the earth meets the sky in an endless horizon. The Tecnica's striking silhouette is illuminated by the stark, white light of dawn, casting a stark shadow on the crystalline surface below. Its body, coated in a dynamic shade of Verde Selvans, glistens as if the very essence of speed and agility has been captured in paint and metal. The cutting-edge aerodynamic design, with its sharp angles and bold lines, hints at the beast that lies within, a masterpiece of engineering ready to challenge the elements. In the silence of this vast emptiness, the Technica is not just a car, but a statement—a confluence of art, passion, and performance. As the first rays of sun glint off its angular Lamborghini rims, the scene is set not just for a drive, but for an experience, a moment where the Lamborghini Huracán Tecnica redefines the essence of super sports cars."
Write me a image prompt for generating “A futuristic hover board”

"Picture a sleek, cutting-edge hoverboard floating effortlessly a few inches above the ground in a busy, neon-lit urban plaza of the future. The board is engineered with a glossy, metallic finish that reflects the vibrant city lights and the dynamic hues of the digital advertisements that decorate the towering skyscrapers above. Its design is minimalist yet futuristic, with clean lines and integrated LED lights that emit a soft, pulsating glow, indicating its state-of-the-art antigravity propulsion system at work. The hoverboard is surrounded by a subtle magnetic field that distorts the air around it, a visual testament to its power and advanced technology. Beneath it, the ground is a tapestry of transparent smart panels that illuminate the path ahead, adapting to the flow of the bustling crowd. In the background, pedestrians and robotic entities move aside, their expressions a mix of admiration and longing, as they witness the seamless integration of human and machine, freedom and motion. This image captures not just a futuristic hoverboard, but a glimpse into a world where technology elevates the very essence of travel and personal expression."
